hero.subtitle: We build intelligent system architectures that eliminate manual chaos and scale with your business — measurable, scalable, GDPR-compliant.

marquee.item1: Quote time from 3 days to 4 hours

features.label: Our Three Pillars
features.title: Structural Intelligence for Every Level of Your Business

strategy.title: Revenue System Architecture
strategy.description: Automated lead qualification, AI-powered quoting, and seamless CRM integration. More closings, faster response times, lower sales costs — your revenue engine on autopilot.

automation.title: Operational Intelligence
automation.description: Intelligent workflows for your back office: From automated document processing to project management and full process automation with n8n. Scale without hiring.

development.title: Executive AI Advisory
development.description: Strategic AI consulting at the C-level. We develop your long-term AI roadmap, identify the biggest levers, and give you the confidence to make the right decisions in a rapidly changing tech landscape.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: We don't sell tools. We build systems.
philosophy.text1: Most companies don't fail because of missing technology — they fail because of missing architecture. Spreadsheet chaos, manual processes, and missed leads cost you real money every single day.
philosophy.text2: Our approach: First understand your value chain, then build the system architecture that replaces manual chaos with automated intelligence. No gimmicks. No proof-of-concept without a plan. Only solutions that pay for themselves in weeks.
philosophy.principle1_desc: If the system saves 100k, 30k isn't a cost — it's an investment. We communicate results, not features.
philosophy.principle2_desc: No tool-hopping. We build infrastructure that still stands in 3 years and keeps pace with your growth.
philosophy.principle3_desc: We work with decision-makers, not departments. Direct communication, short paths, strategic sparring at the C-level.

advantages.label: Why Doblyx
advantages.title: What to Expect From Working With Us

item1.title: End-to-End Execution
item1.description: From analysis to architecture to a running system — everything under one roof. No game of telephone between consultants, developers, and your team.

item2.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
item2.description: GDPR-compliant, secure infrastructure, full data sovereignty. Built for leaders who see compliance as a standard, not an obstacle.

item3.title: Results in Weeks, Not Months
item3.description: First measurable results in under 4 weeks. Agile sprints with weekly reviews — you see progress, not just slide decks.

item4.title: Systems That Scale
item4.description: No island solutions. We build modular architectures that expand seamlessly — from one process to your entire organization.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: Four Steps to Your AI System Architecture

step1.title: Audit
step1.description: We analyze your value chain and identify the processes with the highest automation leverage.

step2.title: Architecture
step2.description: Joint development of the system architecture with a clear roadmap, measurable KPIs, and defined ROI.

step3.title: Build & Integrate
step3.description: Agile execution in 2-week sprints with seamless integration into your existing infrastructure.

step4.title: Scale & Optimize
step4.description: Continuous optimization and expansion to additional business areas. Your system grows with your requirements.

process.quote: "We don't sell AI tools. We build the infrastructure your company needs for the next 10 years."

processPage.hero_title: A process designed to evolve with you.
processPage.hero_subtitle: No rigid framework. No endless workshops. Four clearly defined phases that take your business from analysis to a running system — in weeks, not months.

phase1.label: Phase 1
phase1.title: Audit & Discovery
phase1.subtitle: Understand before we build.
phase1.description: We dive deep into your value chain. Not with a generic questionnaire, but in direct exchange with the people who live your processes every day.
phase1.point1_desc: Complete capture of your existing workflows — from lead intake to project completion. We identify bottlenecks, media breaks, and manual redundancies.
phase1.point2_desc: Not everything needs automation. We find the 20% of processes that drive 80% of impact — and prioritize ruthlessly.
phase1.point3_desc: Before we build a single workflow, you know exactly: What does it cost, what does it deliver, when does it pay for itself.
phase1.outcome: Outcome: An audit report with a prioritized roadmap, concrete ROI projections, and a clear plan for the next 90 days.

phase2.label: Phase 2
phase2.title: System Architecture
phase2.subtitle: The foundation that carries everything.
phase2.description: This is where we separate ourselves from the pack. While others jump straight to building and patch later, we design the architecture first — then build on a solid foundation.
phase2.point1_desc: Modular architecture that scales. No island solutions, no vendor lock-ins. We rely on open standards and proven technologies.
phase2.point2_desc: How does data flow through your organization? We design the optimal data stream — from CRM to ERP to automated reporting.
phase2.point3_desc: GDPR, data sovereignty, access controls — security isn't an add-on, it's an integral part of the architecture.
phase2.outcome: Outcome: A detailed architecture document with system design, data flow diagrams, and a sprint plan for implementation.

phase3.label: Phase 3
phase3.title: Build & Integrate
phase3.subtitle: Build agile, integrate seamlessly.
phase3.description: No months-long black-box development. We work in 2-week sprints with weekly reviews. You see progress in real-time and can intervene at any point.
phase3.point1_desc: Every sprint delivers a working increment. After 2 weeks you see first results — not after 6 months.
phase3.point2_desc: Your existing systems stay intact. We integrate with CRM, ERP, email, document management — without disrupting your operations.
phase3.point3_desc: Every workflow is tested under real conditions. Edge cases, error scenarios, performance — nothing goes live until it proves itself in practice.
phase3.outcome: Outcome: A running system, integrated into your existing infrastructure, tested and ready for production.

phase4.label: Phase 4
phase4.title: Scale & Optimize
phase4.subtitle: Growth without limits.
phase4.description: Go-live isn't the end, it's the beginning. We monitor, optimize, and scale your system — and make your team independent.
phase4.point1_desc: Real-time dashboards show you exactly how the system performs. Throughput times, error rates, ROI — everything at a glance.
phase4.point2_desc: Based on real usage data, we identify optimization opportunities and adapt workflows to changing requirements.
phase4.point3_desc: We train your team and transfer knowledge. Goal: You can make smaller adjustments yourself — without being permanently dependent on us.
phase4.outcome: Outcome: A scalable system that grows with your business. A team that understands it and can evolve it.

processPage.cta_subtitle: Let's find out in 30 minutes where the biggest lever in your business lies.

founder.label: The Founder
founder.title: Building systems that transform businesses.
founder.text1: Eric Dobler founded Doblyx AI with a clear mission: give companies the infrastructure they need to grow faster than their headcount. After years in consulting and software development, he realized that most businesses don't fail because of missing technology — they fail because of missing architecture.
founder.text2: Today, he works directly with CEOs and decision-makers to design and implement AI system architectures that replace manual chaos with automated intelligence — measurable, scalable, and GDPR-compliant.

ctaBanner.text: Ready to find out where your biggest lever is?

ctaBannerAlt.text: 30 minutes. No pitch. Just clarity on your next steps.
